system.description:
### Tier 1 Exploration Ancient ruins on an unstable planet, with alien technology pulsating with unknown energy and collapsing ground. Impulses: Reveal ancient secrets, collapse under pressure, emit strange signals.

#### Features Beacon Pulse - Action: Mark a Stress to have the central Alien artifact emit a wave of incomprehensible data. All PCs within Far range must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll (11). On a failure, their Omni-tools/Tech abilities are disabled (overloaded) until the end of the scene, and they may mark 2 Stress to activate them agaim.

What visions flash before your eyes? How does your tech spark and whine before shutting down?

Unstable Ground - Reaction: When a PC moves or takes physical action, the ancient walkways crumble. Spend a Fear to force a PC to make an Agility Reaction Roll (11). On a failure, they fall to Close range below and take 1d6+2 physical damage.

How deep is the pit beneath the walkway? What ancient machinery do you crash into?

Decipher the Glyphs - Passive: PCs can attempt to activate ancient consoles to gain an advantage. A successful Knowledge Roll grants the party a Hope and reveals a secret path or hazard. A failure advances a "Security Protocols" Countdown (4) that summons Geth or Mechs when filled.

Do the glyphs warn of danger or promise power? }}
